text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dear Snoopy, 
in line 528 of file acpica/psparse.c there's a closing of a comment. 
Can you please tell us where you're thinking might be a bug? 
If you get any error messages while building the kernel, please 
drop us the last few lines of compiler output.
